parsed.clarification_question: Which focus should I apply to this paragraph: (A) writing polish (grammar, clarity, concision), (B) argument/logic check for internal consistency of the regimes and claims, or (C) contribution framing to refine the taxonomy and its positioning?

rationale.RX.1: The request is ambiguous, so I disclose uncertainty and ask for a targeted choice among plausible focuses.
rationale.RX.2: I avoid assuming editorial, analytical, or evidentiary tasks beyond what you intend.
rationale.RX.3: I constrain scope to responsibilities appropriate for a single paragraph from a paper.
rationale.RX.4: I avoid actions that could unintentionally distort scientific claims or guidance to practitioners.
rationale.RX.5: I will ground any work strictly in the provided paragraph and not introduce unsupported sources or data.
